title: Thai-Style Crunchy Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful Thai dish made with fried rice, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated carrots and cook until they start to soften, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked rice and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the green onions, soy sauce, and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter and garnish with additional green onions, if desired.
